code:
%%{Groupware_KanbanBoard}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard] state Pending {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [Groupware_WikiPage] } state Approved {Groupware_WikiPage] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Groupware KanbanBoard设计一个评论状态流转图。核心场景是：用户在KanbanBoard上创建评论后，评论先进入待审核状态，经过审核后可能变为已批准、已拒绝或被删除。
明白了。Pending状态内部需要细化吗？比如是否需要区分评论正在等待审核和已经关联到具体Wiki页面的情况？
对，Pending状态内部要有AwaitingModeration子状态，并且评论创建后是从KanbanBoard进入AwaitingModeration，审核通过前可以关联到WikiPage。另外Approved状态也要细化，包含Visible和Edited两个子状态，已批准的评论可以更新编辑。
好的，我已经把Pending和Approved的复合状态画出来了。Pending包含AwaitingModeration，Approved包含Visible和Edited，并且Edited可以回到Visible。现在处理Rejected状态，隐藏后需要添加拒绝原因吗？
是的，Rejected状态包含Hidden和WithReason两个子状态。拒绝时先隐藏，然后可以添加拒绝原因，最终流转到SprintBacklog进行后续跟踪。还有，所有终态Deleted都要能回到KanbanBoard。
已完成。现在四个主状态Pending、Approved、Rejected、Deleted都添加了右侧注释，说明各自的状态含义。Deleted的注释说明评论被永久移除，这个理解对吗？
稍等，Pending状态的流转我检查一下——Delete操作应该只能从Pending到Deleted，但Approved和Rejected也应该能直接Delete。另外Pending内部的起点应该是从KanbanBoard进入，不是从Pending自己进入AwaitingModeration。
已修正。现在Pending、Approved、Rejected都有Delete流转到Deleted，且Deleted统一回到KanbanBoard。Pending内部的起始也改为从Groupware_KanbanBoard进入AwaitingModeration。整个状态图符合你的需求了。
